items.title: Commonwealth of Massachusetts to issue ~$800M General Obligation Bonds, 2026 Series A/B/C
items.summary: Approximately $800 million in GO bonds expected to be sold via competitive sale the week of April 20, 2026.

items.title: Massachusetts Clean Water Trust — SRF Bonds Series 26A (Green Bonds) and 26B (Sustainability Bonds)
items.summary: Negotiated sale of State Revolving Fund Bonds. Jefferies LLC serving as Book-running Senior Manager.

items.title: Commonwealth to issue $2.7 billion in Social Bonds pursuant to the UI Improvement Act
items.summary: Information Statement posted to EMMA and to massbondholder.com on March 24, 2026.

items.title: Investor Conference Call — March 24, 2026 Information Statement
items.summary: Conference call held Wednesday April 1, 2026 at 11:00am EST to discuss the most recent Information Statement.
